data.title: Cloud Hosting, Provisioning, and Managed Services for IHS Health IT Systems
data.summary: Sources sought notice for cloud hosting, provisioning, and managed services to support IHS health IT systems. IHS is exploring options for migrating existing on-premises health IT workloads to FedRAMP-authorized cloud environments. This is an information-gathering exercise, not a solicitation for proposals.

warnings: This is a sources sought notice, not a solicitation. The response date is informational only.

data.overview: IHS seeks capability statements from vendors able to provide cloud hosting (IaaS/PaaS), managed services, data migration, HIPAA/FedRAMP High compliance support, and 24/7 help desk/technical support for health IT systems.

requirements.description: Managed services including monitoring, patching, and incident response
Data migration services from legacy systems
HIPAA and FedRAMP High compliance support
24/7 help desk and tier 2/3 technical support

incumbentInfo.notes: This is a sources sought notice for market research purposes. No incumbent contractor is identified.

risks.description: Sources sought only — no guarantee a solicitation will follow
HIPAA and FedRAMP High compliance requirements limit eligible vendors

data.narrativeSummary: No past performance evaluation applicable — this is a sources sought notice, not a competitive procurement.

criteria.name: TECHNICAL_FIT
criteria.rationale: Cloud hosting and managed services align with IT capabilities, though healthcare IT specialization is required.

criteria.name: PAST_PERFORMANCE_RELEVANCE
criteria.rationale: No relevant healthcare IT cloud migration past performance on record.

criteria.name: PRICING_POSITION
criteria.rationale: No pricing information available — this is a sources sought notice.

criteria.name: STRATEGIC_ALIGNMENT
criteria.rationale: Federal healthcare IT is not a current strategic focus area.

criteria.name: INCUMBENT_RISK
criteria.rationale: Unknown competitive landscape; sources sought indicates early market research phase.

blockers: Sources sought only — no active procurement to bid on
requiredActions: Submit capability statement if interested in potential future solicitation
data.summaryJustification: This is a sources sought notice, not an active solicitation. No proposal can be submitted at this time.
data.decisionRationale: NO_GO because there is no active procurement. Recommend monitoring for a future solicitation.
data.confidenceExplanation: Low confidence due to sources sought nature — acquisition strategy not yet determined.

data.strategy: No pricing strategy applicable — this is a sources sought notice with no defined requirement scope for pricing.
data.competitivePosition: Unknown — no competitive procurement exists yet.
